body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/travel/bill/push-callback 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/travel/bill/push-callback 
 ## 接口描述 

消费平台推送申请单回调接口 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platform","required":true,"label":"%E6%B6%88%E8%B4%B9%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%B8%A0%E9%81%93","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%EF%BC%88ZAI_TU%EF%BC%89%E5%9C%A8%E9%80%94"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billType","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20(TRAVEL_APPLY)%E5%B7%AE%E6%97%85%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%2C%EF%BC%88INVITATION_APPLY)%E6%8B%9B%E5%BE%85%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"requestData","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%8A%A5%E6%96%87","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"responseData","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E6%8A%A5%E6%96%87","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"code","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%EF%BC%88SUCCESS%EF%BC%89%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8C%EF%BC%88FAIL%EF%BC%89%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"completeTime","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%EF%BC%9Ayyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 
```
{
    "billId": "2023071102217409",
    "platform": "ZAI_TU",
    "billType": "TRAVEL_APPLY",
    "requestData": "[{\"applyEmpId\":\"U0000\",\"applyEmpName\":\"张灯结彩\",\"billComId\":\"0000\",\"billComName\":\"憨人科技\",\"billDepId\":\"0000\",\"billDepName\":\"憨人科技\",\"billId\":2023071102217409,\"billStatus\":\"1\",\"billType\":\"TRAVEL_APPLY\",\"businessTrips\":[{\"arriveCityCode\":\"2\",\"arriveCityName\":\"天津市\",\"arriveTime\":\"2023-07-13 23:00:00.0\",\"departCityCode\":\"1\",\"departCityName\":\"北京市\",\"departTime\":\"2023-07-12 00:00:00.0\",\"roundTrip\":\"N\"}],\"operatorEmpId\":\"U0000\",\"operatorEmpName\":\"张灯结彩\",\"peers\":[{\"empId\":\"V0003\",\"empName\":\"小招喵\"},{\"empId\":\"V0004\",\"empName\":\"杨测试\"}]},{\"applyEmpId\":\"U0000\",\"applyEmpName\":\"张灯结彩\",\"billComId\":\"0000\",\"billComName\":\"憨人科技\",\"billDepId\":\"0000\",\"billDepName\":\"憨人科技\",\"billId\":2023070602202810,\"billStatus\":\"19\",\"billType\":\"TRAVEL_APPLY\",\"businessTrips\":[{\"arriveCityCode\":\"2\",\"arriveCityName\":\"天津市\",\"arriveTime\":\"2023-07-08 23:00:00.0\",\"departCityCode\":\"1\",\"departCityName\":\"北京市\",\"departTime\":\"2023-07-07 00:00:00.0\",\"roundTrip\":\"N\"}],\"operatorEmpId\":\"U0000\",\"operatorEmpName\":\"张灯结彩\",\"peers\":[]}]",
    "responseData": "{\"status\":0,\"msg\":\"推送成功!\"}",
    "code": "SUCCESS",
    "errorMessage": "",
    "completeTime": "2023-07-17 14:52:12"
}
```
  
## 错误码说明 
SUC0000 成功 ERROR00 失败

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/travel/bill/push-callback

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/travel/bill/push-callback

接口描述

消费平台推送申请单回调接口

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platform","required":true,"label":"%E6%B6%88%E8%B4%B9%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%B8%A0%E9%81%93","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%EF%BC%88ZAI_TU%EF%BC%89%E5%9C%A8%E9%80%94"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billType","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20(TRAVEL_APPLY)%E5%B7%AE%E6%97%85%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%2C%EF%BC%88INVITATION_APPLY)%E6%8B%9B%E5%BE%85%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"requestData","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%8A%A5%E6%96%87","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"responseData","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E6%8A%A5%E6%96%87","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"code","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%EF%BC%88SUCCESS%EF%BC%89%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8C%EF%BC%88FAIL%EF%BC%89%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"completeTime","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%EF%BC%9Ayyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"}}]}

接口调用示例

{
    "billId": "2023071102217409",
    "platform": "ZAI_TU",
    "billType": "TRAVEL_APPLY",
    "requestData": "[{\"applyEmpId\":\"U0000\",\"applyEmpName\":\"张灯结彩\",\"billComId\":\"0000\",\"billComName\":\"憨人科技\",\"billDepId\":\"0000\",\"billDepName\":\"憨人科技\",\"billId\":2023071102217409,\"billStatus\":\"1\",\"billType\":\"TRAVEL_APPLY\",\"businessTrips\":[{\"arriveCityCode\":\"2\",\"arriveCityName\":\"天津市\",\"arriveTime\":\"2023-07-13 23:00:00.0\",\"departCityCode\":\"1\",\"departCityName\":\"北京市\",\"departTime\":\"2023-07-12 00:00:00.0\",\"roundTrip\":\"N\"}],\"operatorEmpId\":\"U0000\",\"operatorEmpName\":\"张灯结彩\",\"peers\":[{\"empId\":\"V0003\",\"empName\":\"小招喵\"},{\"empId\":\"V0004\",\"empName\":\"杨测试\"}]},{\"applyEmpId\":\"U0000\",\"applyEmpName\":\"张灯结彩\",\"billComId\":\"0000\",\"billComName\":\"憨人科技\",\"billDepId\":\"0000\",\"billDepName\":\"憨人科技\",\"billId\":2023070602202810,\"billStatus\":\"19\",\"billType\":\"TRAVEL_APPLY\",\"businessTrips\":[{\"arriveCityCode\":\"2\",\"arriveCityName\":\"天津市\",\"arriveTime\":\"2023-07-08 23:00:00.0\",\"departCityCode\":\"1\",\"departCityName\":\"北京市\",\"departTime\":\"2023-07-07 00:00:00.0\",\"roundTrip\":\"N\"}],\"operatorEmpId\":\"U0000\",\"operatorEmpName\":\"张灯结彩\",\"peers\":[]}]",
    "responseData": "{\"status\":0,\"msg\":\"推送成功!\"}",
    "code": "SUCCESS",
    "errorMessage": "",
    "completeTime": "2023-07-17 14:52:12"
}

错误码说明

SUC0000 成功 ERROR00 失败
